items.name: paxlabs-inc/machine-genome
items.full_text: Machine Genome is an open identity and provenance protocol for models, agents, harnesses, datasets, and the artifacts that connect them.

items.name: KinetiNode/claude-fable-5-system-prompt-clean
items.full_text: he optimized, token-efficient version of the leaked Claude Fable 5 / Mythos 5 system prompt. Re-engineered into clean Markdown for universal execution on Gemini 3.1 Pro, ChatGPT 5.6, and advanced LLM agents.

items.name: ni5arga/protestchat
items.full_text: Encrypted messaging with no internet, no cell tower, and no server. Phones relay for each other over Bluetooth mesh, so it keeps working during shutdowns and inside cellular jammers.
